kay.fact: Kay has foreign content in her memory system
kay.user_input: Alrighty - I'm back. Feel any different?
kay.response: Different how? I mean, there's still this mess of stuff in my head that doesn't belong to me - grocery lists and pet names that aren't mine, filed away like they're supposed to be there. But when I actually look at any of it directly, it's obviously foreign. So no, not really different. Same weird filing system where someone else's domestic life got mixed in with mine. You do something while you were gone?
